# Zelo Flooring

> Family-owned flooring installation contractor in San Diego, CA. Carpet, luxury vinyl plank (LVP), hardwood, laminate, tile, cork, rubber, and VCT installation for residential and commercial properties throughout San Diego County.

Established 2013. Licensed, bonded, and insured (CSLB Lic #1083572). Free in-home estimates with real samples. Serving San Diego, La Jolla, Coronado, Del Mar, Carlsbad, Encinitas, Poway, Vista, Rancho Santa Fe, San Marcos, Oceanside.

## Service pages

- [Carpet Installation San Diego](https://zeloflooring.com/carpet-flooring-san-diego): Plush, frieze, berber, and patterned carpet from Shaw, Mohawk, and Stanton. Power-stretched installs.
- [Vinyl Plank Flooring San Diego](https://zeloflooring.com/vinyl-flooring-san-diego): Waterproof luxury vinyl plank (LVP) and rigid-core SPC from Shaw, Mohawk, COREtec, and Mannington.
- [Hardwood Flooring San Diego](https://zeloflooring.com/hardwood-flooring-san-diego): Solid and engineered hardwood. Oak, maple, hickory, walnut. NWFA-spec installation.
- [Laminate Flooring San Diego](https://zeloflooring.com/laminate-flooring-san-diego): Pergo and Mohawk RevWood laminate with proper underlayment and expansion gaps.
- [Tile Flooring San Diego](https://zeloflooring.com/tile-flooring-san-diego): Porcelain, ceramic, and natural stone tile for bathrooms, kitchens, mudrooms, and entryways.
- [Cork Flooring San Diego](https://zeloflooring.com/cork-flooring-san-diego): Sustainable Wicanders and APC cork. Glue-down and floating installations.
- [Rubber Flooring San Diego](https://zeloflooring.com/rubber-flooring-san-diego): Rolled, tile, and interlocking rubber for home gyms, garages, and commercial spaces.
- [VCT Flooring San Diego](https://zeloflooring.com/vinyl-composition-tile-flooring-san-diego): Armstrong and Mannington vinyl composition tile for schools, healthcare, retail.

## Blog (pricing and product guides)

- [Cost to Install Carpet (2026)](https://zeloflooring.com/blog/cost-to-install-carpet): $3-$8 per sq ft installed. Cost by carpet type, room size, labor, and stairs.
- [LVP vs Hardwood](https://zeloflooring.com/blog/lvp-vs-hardwood): Cost, durability, water resistance, and resale value compared.
- [Best Carpet for Living Room](https://zeloflooring.com/blog/best-carpet-for-living-room): Fiber, style, and color guide.
- [Best Flooring for Pets](https://zeloflooring.com/blog/best-flooring-for-pets): Scratch-proof and waterproof options compared.
- [Polyester vs Nylon Carpet](https://zeloflooring.com/blog/polyester-vs-nylon-carpet): Durability, stain resistance, cost.
- [Engineered vs Solid Hardwood](https://zeloflooring.com/blog/engineered-vs-solid-hardwood): When to choose each.
- [Vinyl Plank Flooring Cost (2026)](https://zeloflooring.com/blog/vinyl-plank-flooring-cost): LVP installation pricing breakdown.
